name: studio.diff_versions
description: Compare two snapshots of an Actium Studio site and return a structured diff of pages, content, and settings changed.
whenToUse: Operator wants to audit what changed between two Studio snapshots before restoring one.
Pre-merge review for a staging → production promote: 'show me what will change'.
Forensic investigation after an unexpected content change — locate the introducing snapshot.
whenNotToUse: Only one snapshot exists — call list_snapshots first to confirm two are available.
Caller wants a textual word-level diff of a single page — use the page-level get_page on each snapshot and diff client-side; this skill is site-level and coarse.
Caller actually wants to restore a snapshot — use publish.restore_snapshot (gated, destructive).
